changes: Added RTC-based time restore and phone time sync
Added MAX7219 clock display support with time, date, day, and temperature cycle
Added button-controlled menu for Clock, Message, Visualizer, Settings, DextBot, Pong, Dodge, and Gesture modes
Added virtual BLE button support for app control
Added display brightness control over BLE
Added 12-hour and 24-hour time format support
Added message animation styles: NONE, WAVE, SCROLL, and RAIN
Added visualizer source selection for device mic and phone mic
Added visualizer styles: BARS, WAVE, and RADIAL
Added clock tools submenu with Alarm, Timer, and Stopwatch
Added buzzer support for alarm and timer alerts
Added OTA debug logs and reboot diagnostics
Added DextBot robo-eye mode with 5 VL53L0X distance expressions: SCARED, SURPRISE, CURIOUS, HAPPY, SLEEPY
Added gyroscope-driven BONK (X-eyes on shake) and DIZZY (orbiting pupils on spin) expressions
Added pupil inertia — pupils lag behind fast movement using gyro-scaled lerp
Added adaptive blink rate per expression and idle sleepy wander
Added three-tier time recovery: RTC battery → NVS flash → phone sync
Added DS1307 oscillator-stop detection to catch dead RTC batteries
Added NVS flash time persistence — device recovers approximate time after power cut
Added EST indicator alternating with time when running on NVS estimated time
Added weather display via BLE — phone pushes OWM data, display cycles condition and outside temperature
Added weather NVS persistence — last known weather survives power cuts
Added KY-037 microphone DC bias removal and proper FFT gain for audio visualizer
Added hardware watchdog (30s timeout) with auto-reboot on hang
Added BLE passkey pairing with bonding stored across reboots
Added encrypted BLE characteristics for secure command channel
Added MTU negotiation (517 bytes) for reliable OTA chunk transfer
Added static_assert to block release builds with empty OTA shared secret
Added battery voltage divider support with ADC averaging
Added MODE:PONG, MODE:DODGE, MODE:GESTURE BLE commands
Experimental: Pong game — tilt paddle against AI, first to 9 wins
Experimental: Dodge game — tilt to dodge falling pixels, speed increases over time
Experimental: Gesture control — tilt LEFT/RIGHT/FWD/BACK/UP/SHAKE fires BLE GESTURE: events
Fixed alarm not firing when active tool was not ALARM
Fixed buildSystemInfoMessage sensor data position overwriting weather data
Fixed weather NVS race condition — writes deferred from BLE callback to main loop
Fixed gyro startup noise causing immediate BONK expression on power-on
Fixed DEXTBOT eye column direction for FC16 hardware
Fixed BONK-to-DIZZY transition timer logic
Fixed dizzy orbit speed using real elapsed time instead of constant frame interval
Fixed trim() crash on empty OTA command fields
Fixed menu labels not rendering when entering menu from DEXTBOT mode
Fixed eyes overwriting menu label in DEXTBOT mode
Fixed NVS time recovery showing stale time silently — now shows EST indicator
Fixed stopwatch display rate-limited to 5 Hz
Fixed String heap fragmentation in all hot paths — replaced with snprintf and char buffers
Fixed double advertising restart on disconnect
Fixed setAuthenticationMode and setPassKey API signatures for ESP-IDF v5
Fixed BAT: BLE command accepting spoofed battery level from client
Fixed esp_task_wdt_init API for Arduino Core 3.x / ESP-IDF v5 config struct
Removed unused globals: g_lastDisplayedTimeValid, g_visualizerPhase, NVS_KEY_SAVE_MS
